prompts.name: Raw Photo
prompts.text: Give the image a raw photo feeling with realistic exposure, natural color response, and believable imperfections.

prompts.name: Editorial Photography
prompts.text: Present the image as editorial photography with polished styling, confident composition, and premium magazine-like finish.

prompts.name: Portrait Photography
prompts.text: Compose the image as professional portrait photography with flattering light, clear facial detail, and natural depth separation.

prompts.name: Fashion Photography
prompts.text: Present the image as fashion photography with outfit-focused composition, polished posing, and refined styling.

prompts.name: Lifestyle Photography
prompts.text: Create a lifestyle photography look with natural setting, candid energy, and believable everyday detail.

prompts.name: Street Photography
prompts.text: Create a street photography look with real urban context, natural movement, and candid visual storytelling.

prompts.name: Documentary Photography
prompts.text: Create a documentary photography feeling with grounded realism, natural framing, and believable environmental context.

prompts.name: Fine Art Photography
prompts.text: Create a fine-art photography feeling with careful composition, refined mood, and deliberate visual structure.

prompts.name: Product Photography
prompts.text: Use product photography clarity with clean lighting, sharp detail, and strong material readability.

prompts.name: Macro Photography
prompts.text: Use macro photography emphasis with extreme close detail, shallow depth, and crisp texture focus.

prompts.name: Analog Film
prompts.text: Give the image an analog film character with subtle grain, natural contrast, and timeless color response.

prompts.name: Instant Film
prompts.text: Give the image an instant-film feeling with soft contrast, nostalgic color, and casual charm.

prompts.name: High Fashion
prompts.text: Present the image as high-fashion photography with bold styling, refined elegance, and strong visual identity.

prompts.name: Cinematic Still
prompts.text: Frame the image like a cinematic still with visual storytelling, balanced composition, and expressive atmosphere.

prompts.name: Travel Photography
prompts.text: Create a travel photography feel with a strong sense of place, natural lighting, and rich environmental detail.
